title: poa sterilis subsp. biebersteinii
intro: Poa sterilis subsp. biebersteinii, also known as Bieberstein's meadow-grass or Poa biebersteinii, is a subspecies of the Poa sterilis grass. It is a type of perennial grass that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and parts of North Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues, including respiratory problems, digestive issues, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Poa sterilis subsp. biebersteinii can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats.
